title: COVID-19: An Opportunity to Shift the Focus from Megacities to Small Towns

summary.about: Whether more balanced regional development could reduce India’s vulnerability to pandemics and megacity congestion.
summary.audience: Urban planners, regional-development agencies and employment policymakers.
summary.method: Combines household data from 18 urban areas with a GTAP-based shutdown scenario.
summary.insights: Poor urban households lack space, water and hygiene protections; stronger small-town employment could reduce forced migration and urban risk.
